sections.heading: Overview
sections.paragraph: The current monthly intelligence brief regarding PROTAC technology and associated pharmaceutical developments synthesizes available data from multiple sources, though significant technical failures were encountered during content retrieval for several regional articles. While five submitted articles from BioSpectrum Asia covering APAC diagnostics and biomedicine growth returned server errors precluding substantive analysis, a strategic co-development partnership between Rayca Precision and Data Powered Therapeutics was successfully identified. This collaboration integrates Rayca Precision’s computational discovery engine, which models therapeutic targets in motion using structure-aware generative methods, with Data Powered Therapeutics’ platform for automated wet-lab data generation at scale. The partnership specifically targets difficult oncology settings, including cancers resistant to standard therapy, immune-evasive tumors, and aggressive neuroendocrine cancers such as small cell lung cancer, including cases with brain metastases. A key therapeutic mechanism underpinning this initiative is targeted protein degradation through a nanobody bioPROTAC approach, alongside other mechanisms with first-in-class potential. By pairing computational design with high-throughput experimental validation, the companies aim to resolve developability liabilities such as expression and stability early in the discovery process, compressing sequential work into automated runs that return decision-grade data in weeks. This initiative addresses the rate-limiting step in modern drug discovery by prioritizing empirical evidence at scale to sharpen design and bring differentiated nanobody therapeutics to resistant cancers despite broader data unavailability.

points.text: Rayca Precision — Nanobody bioPROTAC — Oncology (Small Cell Lung Cancer, Resistant Cancers) — Strategic co-development partnership with Data Powered Therapeutics
Rayca Precision: Strategic objective to confront attrition at the design stage using modelling and collective intelligence; associated with nanobody therapeutics and bioPROTAC.
Data Powered Therapeutics: Strategic objective to generate experimental evidence at scale via automated wet-lab data generation; associated with nanobody variant characterization.

Mechanism: Targeted protein degradation through a nanobody bioPROTAC approach; Status: Discovery stage advancing toward development candidates; Population: Cancers resistant to standard therapy, immune-evasive tumors, aggressive neuroendocrine cancers (small cell lung cancer), disease spread to brain.
Rayca Precision and Data Powered Therapeutics entered a strategic co-development partnership to design and advance nanobody therapeutics.
